title: Post-067 One-Worker Pilot Publication Readiness Decision
objective: Record the post-publication readiness decision after the validated Packet 063 one-mutation-worker artifact was published and `/home/olares/code/apex` returned to clean parity, without opening migration, simultaneous parallel source/test execution, another mutation worker, package/toolchain repair, runtime/service mutation, or wider Olares scope.
dependency_note: Packet 067 published the validated Packet 063 source/test artifact in commit `43635c030e9e16d37eb8c815974e1131fa4193ec` and restored `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity at that commit.

readiness_upgrade.previous_posture: Phase 5 was ready for bounded parallel-work planning and a later one-mutation-worker pilot, but actual parallel source/test execution remained closed.
readiness_upgrade.new_posture: Phase 5 has now completed one full one-mutation-worker source/test pilot cycle: host execution, workstation mirror validation, parent-root publication, and clean host reconciliation.
limits: This is not approval for simultaneous multi-worker source/test mutation.
This is not approval for a second mutation worker.
This is not package/toolchain repair authority.
This is not runtime/service mutation authority.
This is not AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting authority.

evidence_floor: Packet 063 executed exactly one mutation worker and exactly one two-file source/test slice.

Packet 065 validated the exact artifact on the workstation with matching SHA-256 `36aa41ad9a0997c7c8fd909080113ca8169b26758fe17537475d5cc461ca2844`, `git diff --check`, `tsc --noEmit`, `next build`, and focused Playwright smoke with 3 tests passing.
`/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remains observe-only at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count 30.
Package and lockfile paths remained clean.
closed_boundaries: slice widening beyond separately packetized scope
next_packet_candidate: Olares Phase 5 069 - Packet 067 And Packet 068 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
next_packet_note: If this lane continues later, the smallest truthful next packet is authority publication for Packet 067 local closeout and Packet 068 decision authority, not another source/test execution packet by implication. The current tranche stops after Packet 068 by operator instruction.
constrained_outputs: A Packet 068 decision JSON and handoff recording the narrow readiness upgrade
Routing and roadmap updates that record Packet 068 closeout and name Packet 069 only as a later authority-publication candidate

No source edits, no host mutation, no publication, no migration approval, no runtime/service mutation, no package or lockfile mutation, no install, no remote rewrite, no second-worker execution, no slice widening, and no old-clone mutation
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, host mutation, publication, migration approval, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, second-worker execution, slice widening, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05. Packet 068 records that Phase 5 has completed one full one-mutation-worker source/test pilot cycle through host execution, workstation validation, parent-root publication, and clean host reconciliation. The readiness upgrade is narrow: a later packet may plan another separate one-worker pilot or disjoint-scope governance, but no simultaneous multi-worker source/test execution, migration, second worker, package/toolchain repair, runtime/service mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, force/reset/clean, slice widening, or old-clone mutation opens.
